title: How to e-Verify your income tax return: Different ways to verify your ITR and step-by-step process
summary: e-Verify is a digital process to authenticate your Income Tax Return after filing. You must e-Verify your ITR within 30 days from the date of filing your return. If not done within the deadline, the IT department may treat your return as invalid.

summary: The final day of the EPFO portal upgrade marks the last phase of the planned system overhaul.
